positiveClaims: The existing release claim execution gate is product-bound as bounded internal Review Bridge 12K execution-gate evidence.
Accepted 12K requires raw 12J command admission input and re-evaluates the 12J command admission internally before accepting execution-gate evidence.
Accepted 12K requires the internally evaluated 12J command admission result to have accepted command admission type, status, code, and reason.
Accepted 12K requires the internally evaluated 12J command admission binding fields for mode, claimId, dossierId, matrixId, and releaseClass.
Accepted 12K requires the internally evaluated 12J command admission summary fields for claimSurface, packetId, attestationId, commandId, and admissionClass.
Optional commandAdmissionResult input is consistency evidence only; stale, fabricated, inherited, or non-plain supplied values are blocked unless they match the internally re-evaluated 12J result.
Accepted 12K emits a deterministic non-mutating execution-gate result with fixed top-level, binding, and summary keys.

This contour is release claim execution-gate evidence only; it is not command availability, command execution, release execution completion, product publication, release readiness, import, export, apply, storage truth, or project truth.
nonClaims: No release execution completion is claimed.
No release publication completion is claimed.
No release-wide publication authority is claimed.
No Google Docs support is claimed.
No DOCX support expansion is claimed.
No review import completion is claimed.
No manuscript write is performed by release claim execution gate binding.
No project truth write is performed by release claim execution gate binding.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by release claim execution gate binding.
No DOCX import safe-create behavior is changed.
No DOCX export behavior is changed.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, cloud sync, cross-platform readiness, packaged readiness, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: Execution gate binding is internal chain evidence only.
Execution gate binding does not execute release commands.
Execution gate binding does not prove command execution.
Execution gate binding does not admit release execution completion.
Execution gate binding does not admit command availability.
Execution gate binding does not publish anything.
Execution gate binding does not become project truth by itself.
12L command surface admission wiring remains a downstream regression surface and is not semantically reopened by this contour.
USER_FACING_CLAIM_READY remains an internal chain class only, not a release readiness state.
USER_FACING is a chain surface in this contour, not a user-facing UI state.
This contour is not a real release execution contour.
This contour is not a product publication contour.

machineChecks.command: node --test release claim execution gate contracts
node --test command surface admission wiring contracts
node --test execution gate plus command surface plus binding contracts
node --test review bridge release claim binding contracts

agentAudits.finding: Confirmed current 12K no longer accepts caller-supplied commandAdmissionResult as truth: raw commandAdmissionInput is required, 12J is re-evaluated internally, and optional commandAdmissionResult is witness-only.
Prepared the raw commandAdmissionInput and witness-only test policy; local orchestrator integrated it with runtime implementation and corrected the tests-only pending status.

nextStep: complete delivery chain for this bounded 12K execution-gate binding; 12L semantics, real command execution, real product publication, and post-MVP import/export expansion do not open by implication
